description: Configure an automated environmental alert integration in Nx Witness VMS (https://localhost:7001). Create an event rule for a Generic Event triggered by source 'TempSensor_01' and caption 'Overheat' that creates a bookmark on the 'Server Room Camera' with tags 'environment' and 'danger'. Simulate the sensor event using the API endpoint (https://localhost:7001/api/createEvent) with admin credentials (admin / Admin1234!) to verify the bookmark is successfully generated on the camera timeline.
